campaign_info.name: Mutants Campaign
campaign_info.world_state: Martial law following Mayor Calloway's assassination at the gala attack
themes: Appearance - visible divide between passing and obvious mutants
Double Life - civilian identity vs vigilante operations
Mutant Excellence - impossible standards of being 'one of the good ones'
The Trolley Problem - difficult moral choices with no perfect solutions
Systems of Inequality - institutional discrimination through licensing and corporate control

active.name: Henry Luc Lavere
active.powers: Osteokinesis - bone manipulation, growth, and reshaping
active.background: Born in Martinique, raised by Bri after father disappeared
active.family: Son of immortal Bri, half-brother to Hellbeast, related to Achillas and Baatar Khan
active.status: In hiding with MLF after Galvanize ultimatum expired
active.relationships: Dating Cecilia Monroe, building personal faction within MLF
active.faction: MLF - fully committed, recruited multiple new members

active.name: Lucille Fantana
active.powers: Marble body control, stone-to-marble transformation, sensing abilities
active.background: Born in Paris after mutant rebellion, raised by MLF community
active.family: Sister to Vivienne (Project Element composite hero)
active.status: Active MLF leadership, works with Angel's New Christians

active.name: William O'Connor
active.powers: Fear manipulation, supernatural stealth, emotional suppression
active.background: 63-year-old homeless mutant, guardian to Salt and Pepper twins
active.status: Grieving Pepper's death, blames Apollo for gala explosion
active.motivation: Opposing experimental programs after losing Pepper

active.name: Mason Rhodes
active.powers: Blood manipulation, memory reading through blood contact, hexing abilities
active.background: EMT dedicated to preserving life while operating as vigilante
active.family: Sister Darlene works at Freaks with blood manipulation
active.status: ULMH training while maintaining underground medical network
active.faction: Bridge between registered and unregistered communities

active.name: Bri Sato
active.powers: Immortal regeneration, ancient knowledge, combat experience
active.background: 3000+ year old immortal, Princess Briseis from Trojan War
active.family: Mother to Henry, Baatar Khan, Hellbeast; connected to Achillas
active.status: Recently staying with Baatar Khan, maternal concern for Henry

missing_compromised.name: Varia Khan
missing_compromised.status: HOSTILE - ROGUE - controlling Sentinel robot army

missing_compromised.name: Florian Gravy
missing_compromised.status: DECEASED - killed during election candidate meeting
missing_compromised.background: Journalist turned activist, killed Maxwell Ryder before being shot

ulmh_heroes.name: Apollo
ulmh_heroes.background: Claims to be mythological god, 10,000 BC origins

mlf_operatives.name: Serena Kleist
mlf_operatives.status: Active leader of Seattle New MLF cell
mlf_operatives.background: Daughter of Everest Kleist, raised by uncle Frostbite

corporate_figures.name: Baatar Khan
corporate_figures.family: Father to Varia Khan, son of Bri

other_important.name: Pepper
other_important.status: DECEASED - Twin formerly protected by Vagrant
other_important.background: Military experiment survivor, death motivates Vagrant

ulmh.description: Government-sanctioned hero organization controlling mutant licensing

mlf.description: Revolutionary organization fighting for mutant equality and autonomy
mlf.operations: Underground network of safe houses and support services

corporations.name: Khan Corp
corporations.focus: Research corporation with government program ties

corporations.name: GeneSys Corporation
corporations.focus: Social platform secretly harvesting mutant data

martial_law.cause: Mayor Brenda Calloway assassination at gala attack
martial_law.authority: Seattle Police Department given emergency powers
martial_law.structure: City divided into controlled districts with checkpoints

refugee_crisis.cause: Massive influx of mutant refugees from neighboring cities
refugee_crisis.conditions: Makeshift camps, overcrowded shelters, underground networks
refugee_crisis.tensions: Growing anti-refugee sentiment from resource competition

evolution_plague.spread: Disease spreading rapidly among refugee populations
evolution_plague.mortality: 90% fatal to mutants, 99% fatal to humans
evolution_plague.origins: Unclear - possibly natural, engineered, or stress-triggered
evolution_plague.consequences: Justification for quarantine and increased control

key_locations.seattle_districts: City divided into controlled districts with checkpoints
key_locations.tartarus_facility: ULMH underwater facility for rehabilitation programs
key_locations.refugee_camps: Makeshift camps in parks and abandoned buildings
key_locations.tunnel_networks: Extensive underground system known to Vagrant

technology_impact.hardening_required: All electronics require hardening against interference
technology_impact.persistent_echo: Ghost presence in systems causing unpredictable disruption
technology_impact.regression: Forced technological regression of approximately 20 years
technology_impact.hybrid_systems: Mechanical-digital hybrids now standard for critical infrastructure

detection_control.technopathic_sensing: Technopathic mutants can sense Override presence
detection_control.surveillance_systems: Adapted for mutant detection and monitoring
detection_control.emergency_protocols: Preparations for potential future Override-level events

key_mechanics: Tier advancement through experience and story progression
Power evolution based on character development
Vigilante operations vs official hero work

recent_major_events: Gala attack and Mayor Calloway's assassination
Apollo's disappearance after revealing true form
Varia Khan's transformation into Neo-Sentinel threat
Florian's killing spree at candidate meeting
ongoing_threads: Neo-Sentinel's control over city and Sentinel army
Emergency mayoral election with Unity as MLF candidate
District X referendum for autonomous mutant zone
Underground medical network expansion by Mason
MLF safe house network growth under Serena's leadership
ULMH rehabilitation programs at Tartarus facility
